title: You Like Food [Fabric]
description: A modpack based on food. How much food you eat is how much hearts you can possibly gain. A modpack that has farming and a bit of RPG mix into it but for the Fabric Modloader
body:
This modpack mainly revolves around the mod Spice of Fabric. With Spice of Fabric there is Nutritional Value involved now and there is no milestone I would say for eating food. As long as there is food in the pack you can gain an infinite amount of hearts for every unique food there is. There may be a little over 1000 foods currently in this Fabric pack, will be more as the updates come to it. Close to 160 mods that come together to make this Fabric pack

With mods like Zenith, a fabric port of Apotheosis, and Eldritch Mobs, Which fills in the missing adventure module of Zenith. Adding different rarities to random spawning monsters sometimes. With Better Combat installed, for a more realistic fighting style into the pack and several other mods that have compatibility with it. With many other mods overhauling certain aspects of Minecraft, like Villages and the Terrain itself. This is You Like Food, a food cuisine adventure pack. 

Let's see if you can eat every food in this pack.

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________________

I am always open to suggestions for new mods to add or new features that can be changed. Please join the discord and give me any suggestion you feel would go great with this pack. I am always trying to grow this pack. If you want come and play on the modded server meant for this modpack. 

Discord link is under external resources if you ever felt like joining.
